pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which generates this exact file path, and verifier.py which evaluates it.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which creates a worksheet named 'Weights' containing criteria values.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which populates a worksheet named 'Sites' with real-world city location data.
Confirmed via task description (which instructs creating a sheet named 'Top_Sites') and verifier.py (which checks for 'Top_Sites' in wb.sheetnames).

Confirmed via task description which explicitly lists these column names to be inserted. verifier.py extracts these headers from columns I through N, although it only grades based on the underlying formulas.

privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a dynamically generated spreadsheet file '/home/ga/Documents/store_locations.xlsx'. Data is processed from the 'Sites' sheet, and metrics are weighted according to values in the 'Weights' sheet. The user adds six new columns ('Norm_Pop', 'Norm_Income', 'Norm_Comp', 'Norm_Lease', 'Total_Score', 'Rank') in columns I through N and creates a new 'Top_Sites' sheet using dynamic lookups to retrieve the top 5 ranking locations.
